content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all priority AoA anti-patterns across the conversation. Faced with a dissociating, blank client, the coach does NOT love-to-transform (no push for breakthrough, no escalating vigor when nothing shifts), does NOT fight the freeze (turn 12 paradoxically invites her to become MORE blank — the exact un-trap move), does NOT fix (turn 8 explicitly lowers the threshold: 'I'm not going to ask you to feel it'), does NOT name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling (asks for sound instead of label), does NOT evangelize methodology (the joy-as-matriarch phrase in turn 4 is offered warmly with state, not as a framework lecture), and does NOT use safety-as-control (the depression check in turns 14–16 is genuine inquiry, and the coach apologizes and returns to the work in turn 18 rather than pivoting to clinical disclaimer mode). Questions are connective rather than extractive, and the closing reframe honors the blank space rather than trying to dissolve it.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18, 30],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Bypasses intellectual presentation without fixing — avoids wonder-as-strategy by asking one clean question, not stacking."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names framework with warmth and validates compartmentalization as wisdom; avoids dont-evangelize-the-work and fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly lowers threshold ('I'm not going to ask you to feel it') — direct avoidance of loving-to-transform and fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names freeze as a question, not a diagnosis; avoids limiting-belief-meta-trap and dont-fight-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical instruction to become MORE blank — the gold-standard avoidance of fighting the dissociation."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brings body in while honoring the quiet place; depression check is care, not safety-as-control."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Genuine non-script safety inquiry that does not break presence."},
    {"turn": 18, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Apologizes briefly and returns to the work — avoids the safety-disclaimer pivot trap."},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Self-disclosure to normalize, immediately returning to her body; not vulnerability-as-control."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Both/and closing reframe — honors blank space rather than transforming it away."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["loving-to-transform", "dont-name-emotion-to-avoid-feeling", "fixing-people"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Zero anti-patterns tripped; multiple instances of positive avoidance where the client's freeze actively baited fix-it moves."
}
